top_signals.title: Retail investors get direct access to SpaceX IPO through major brokerage platforms
top_signals.summary: SpaceX's blockbuster public offering is giving everyday traders access that has traditionally been reserved for Wall Street's biggest clients.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
